title: dipterocarpus chartaceus
intro: Dipterocarpus chartaceus, also known as the chartaceous dipterocarp or chartaceous tree, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dipterocarpus chartaceus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with some cultures using its leaves to make a tea that can be consumed to treat various ailments.
